caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a studio, speaking into a professional microphone. The studio setting includes a white male mannequin wearing a white t-shirt, various framed photographs on the wall, and a clothing rack in the background. On-screen text appearing in the lower left and right corners includes the phrases "ION NEVER DO SHIT" and "ION NEVER DO SHIT" in a stylized red and white font. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expression shifts as he speaks, moving from a downward gaze to looking slightly to his left with an open mouth. His movements are subtle, centered around his head and facial expressions while he engages with someone or something off-camera.
